rationale: In the citing paper, Lambrecht and Tucker (2013) is used only as a benchmark source for a general claim that banner ad click-through rates are around 0.1%. The citation appears in the discussion/limitations context and is not tied to the paper's hypotheses, model specification, variable construction, or identification strategy. The m-coupon study does not build on or test the cited paper's retargeting framework, so this is a passing contextual mention.
